name: @fora/mcp-breaker
description: FORA MCP circuit breaker — per-tenant+server state machine (closed → open → half_open → closed) with cache-broker persistence adapter. Trips on 5 consecutive failures or errorRate > 0.5 over a 30s sliding window; emits typed `circuit_open` errors and breaker.* metrics. Implements FORA-48 §3.3 per ADR-0013.
